name: 熊刀（★） | 夜色
descriptionEn: This tanto-style survival knife features a faceted blade and full tang, complete with impact pommel. No fuss, no moving parts - just a reliable blade that's ready to work. It has been spray-painted with a tape mask pattern in a night ops color scheme. Spray... Pray... Paint... Stab.
descriptionZh: 这把日式短刀风格的求生刀具拥有多面刀刃和带握点的全刀柄。没有任何多余的部分 - 一把时刻准备战斗的可靠武器。 这把武器以黑夜配色的纸带图案进行了喷漆。 喷绘... 渲染... 上色... 刺杀。
